Explanation: All three peer agents identified the article "Influence of Sunlight Incidence and Fruit Chemical Features on Oviposition Site Selection in Mango by Anastrepha obliqua: Implications for Management" as the answer. The search confirms this article discusses pest management (impact of pest control) on mango, a fruit containing polyphenols (specifically mangiferin). The study was published in 2021, has multiple authors (within the 4–10 range), and includes affiliations from Chile, which had a population between 17–19 million and female life expectancy between 80–90 years as of 2023. All parameter facts are satisfied [57826].
Exact Answer: Influence of Sunlight Incidence and Fruit Chemical Features on Oviposition Site Selection in Mango by Anastrepha obliqua: Implications for Management
